qa_pairs.question: What are the names and base URLs for the Ceph client package repositories that need to be configured for Enterprise Linux 9 systems?
qa_pairs.answer: For Enterprise Linux 9 systems, three Ceph client package repositories are required: `[Ceph]` with a base URL of `http://download.ceph.com/rpm-tentacle/el9/$basearch`, `[Ceph-noarch]` with a base URL of `http://download.ceph.com/rpm-tentacle/el9/noarch`, and `[ceph-source]` with a base URL of `http://download.ceph.com/rpm-tentacle/el9/SRPMS`. All these repositories require a GPG check with the key `https://download.ceph.com/keys/release.asc`.

qa_pairs.question: Is there an additional repository, besides the Ceph-specific ones, that must be configured to install Ceph client packages on systems like Enterprise Linux 9?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the `epel-release` repository also needs to be configured and installed on systems like Enterprise Linux 9 to install Ceph client packages.
